## Type of change
- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `perf` ‚Äî performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code change, no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî build, deps, tooling
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî test changes only
- [ ] `ci` ‚Äî CI/CD changes

## Checklist
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
- [ ] Types are correct ‚Äî `pnpm typecheck` passes
